title: Lint Report
html:
Lint Report — 2026-04-26

Generated after the densify pass on 2026-04-26. Findings only; no auto-fixes beyond the densify additions in wiki/summaries/, wiki/entities/, wiki/concepts/, wiki/projects/.

Broken wikilinks

target references whose target file does not exist anywhere in the vault (checked across wiki/, root Memory.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md).

Pseudo-aliases for screenshot summaries — these reference summary slugs that were never created (the actual screenshot summaries use long hash filenames):

  • 2025 04 27 biometrics iris keystroke palmprint survey → real file is 2025-04-27-screenshot-2025-04-27-at-7-40-21-pm-e4e5aad8.md
  • 2025 04 27 biometrics fmr fnmr cost benefit → real file is 2025-04-27-screenshot-2025-04-27-at-7-40-38-pm-56e50e24.md
  • 2025 04 27 biometrics privacy security summary → real file is 2025-04-27-screenshot-2025-04-27-at-7-41-04-pm-5f2b64af.md
  • 2025 06 01 mobile malware survey felt → real file is 2025-06-01-screenshot-2025-06-01-at-9-15-20-pm-44f00f66.md
  • 2025 06 01 mobile malware credentials sms → real file is 2025-06-01-screenshot-2025-06-01-at-9-15-26-pm-7f8b8bc5.md
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="summaries/2025-07-18-screenshot-2025-07-18-at-4-56-30-am-db1a0de7">2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 30 am db1a0de7</a> — third Taco Bell screenshot summary referenced 7x but never written

Raw-source filename references (summaries link back to the original raw filename rather than to themselves):

  • 2019 09 10 i am low key writing this to end more like slightly silence
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="summaries/2020-03-30-facebook">2020 03 30 facebook</a>
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="summaries/2021-04-19-an-18-year-old-walks-up-to-a-circus-potentially-seeking-a-jo">2021 04 19 an 18 year old walks up to a circus potentially seeking a jo</a>
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="summaries/2022-03-11-made-people-vote-to-prove-voting-is-a-farce-only-effective-t">2022 03 11 made people vote to prove voting is a farce only effective t</a>
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="summaries/2022-10-25-ahmad-jamal">2022 10 25 ahmad jamal</a>
  • 2024 12 14 this is the end i have have departed from china and am on my
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="summaries/2025-03-01-whoa-lets-think-about-what-just-happening-dude-you-go-to-pea">2025 03 01 whoa lets think about what just happening dude you go to pea</a>
  • 2025 05 04 apple notes osascript titles dump
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="summaries/2026-01-13-rankettcom">2026 01 13 rankettcom</a>

Forward-pointing summary slugs not yet ingested:

  • 2025 01 06 pre agi legacy
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="summaries/2025-02-15-conspiracy-theories">2025 02 15 conspiracy theories</a>
  • 2025 09 24 unspam deliverability test
  • 2026 02 26 fall backwards into the throne
  • 2026 04 26 quit gym job decision — referenced 2x including the rankett page

Bare missing entities/concepts (referenced but no page exists):

  • admin dashboard — referenced from 2026-01-07-rankett-meetup-prep-guide.md
  • brad — boss(?) named in 2025-05-30-todos.md
  • crypto internship
  • determinants of advanced countries checklist
  • fail forward — concept named in 2022-10-25-ahmad-jamal-stream.md
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="entities/great-wall">great wall</a> — referenced in 2024-09-05-shanghai-sidequests.md
  • inter industry trade — sister concept to intra-industry-trade.md
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="concepts/man-from-the-future">man from the future</a> — referenced from 2022-03-11-one-hundred-years-of-solitude-reading-log.md
  • mt qing cheng, qing yang palace — Chengdu sights
  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="entities/peoples-park">peoples park</a>, <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="entities/shanghai-tower">shanghai tower</a>, <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="entities/yu-yin-tang">yu yin tang</a> — Shanghai sights
  • roxane, roxanna — likely same person, both linked from 2025-05-30-todos.md
  • stacked column note — note the embedded space; intended slug is stacked-column-note, but the page doesn't exist either way

Tooling/index noise (probably not worth fixing):

  • wikilinks — appears once
  • CLAUDE — referenced in _inventory.md and possibly index; the file is CLAUDE.md at vault root, Obsidian may or may not resolve depending on settings

Orphan pages

Wiki pages with zero backlinks (excluding index.md, log.md, Memory.md, _RESUME-HERE.md, _inventory.md, plugins.md, dashboards/main.md, _first-batch-2026-04-26.md, _tonight-2026-04-26.md, lint-report.md):

  • wiki/entities/brogden.md
  • wiki/concepts/osascript-as-export-tool.md
  • wiki/concepts/spf-dkim-dmarc.md
  • wiki/entities/unspam-com.md
  • wiki/concepts/zshrc-too-many-open-files.md

All five look like they were created during a recent ingest pass, and the corresponding summary either was not written or did not link back. Worth either (a) writing/linking the summaries that introduce them, or (b) deleting the pages if the source isn't actually in the corpus yet.

Missing pages

Entities/concepts that show up 3+ times across summaries (or other proper nouns recurring in body text) and do not yet have a dedicated page.

Wikilinked but no page (>=3 references):

  • <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="summaries/2025-07-18-screenshot-2025-07-18-at-4-56-30-am-db1a0de7">2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 30 am db1a0de7</a> — 7 references; the third Taco Bell screenshot summary needs to be written.
  • 2025 06 01 mobile malware survey felt (9 refs) — pseudo-alias, see Broken Wikilinks above.
  • 2025 06 01 mobile malware credentials sms (7 refs) — pseudo-alias.
  • 2025 04 27 biometrics iris keystroke palmprint survey (6 refs) — pseudo-alias.
  • 2025 09 24 unspam deliverability test (4 refs) — forward-pointer, no page yet.
  • 2025 04 27 biometrics fmr fnmr cost benefit (4 refs) — pseudo-alias.
  • 2025 05 04 apple notes osascript titles dump (3 refs) — forward-pointer, no page yet.

Bare proper-noun candidates (mentioned 3+ times in summaries body text but never wikilinked):

  • Beijing (6 mentions across 2024-09-05-shanghai-sidequests, 2024-10-22-coffee-shops-in-shanghai, 2024-10-22-valeria-visit, 2024-11-07-xi-an) — clear missing entity. Sister-city to <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="entities/shanghai">shanghai</a>, <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="entities/chengdu">chengdu</a>, <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="entities/xi-an">xi an</a>.
  • Charlie (3) — recurring 2025–2026 social-orbit name (per _first-batch-2026-04-26.md social-orbit note).
  • Stepheven (3) — same cluster as Charlie.
  • Aureliano (3) — One Hundred Years of Solitude character. Probably not worth its own entity but flagged for completeness.

Empty stubs older than today

Per CLAUDE.md, stubs are tagged #stub with > Stub. First mentioned in ... boilerplate and minimal body. Per scope, "older than today" (today = 2026-04-26).

No findings. Every existing stub was created: 2026-04-26 in this session. Re-run after future ingests to surface stubs that have languished without enrichment.

For reference, the sparsest current stubs (1–2 line bodies) — all created today, all eligible for enrichment in a future densify pass:

  • entities/alexandria-nagy.md, entities/frank-helle.md, entities/portland-or.md, entities/fbla.md, entities/beyond-meat.md, entities/openai-api.md, entities/zoom.md, entities/carnival-corp.md, entities/yebw.md, entities/john-maxwell.md
  • entities/chick-fil-a.md, entities/mcdonalds.md, entities/starbucks.md, entities/subway.md, entities/chipotle.md, entities/taco-bell.md, entities/wingstop.md, entities/little-caesars.md — fast-food chain stubs from the BroMenu data-bootstrap cluster
  • entities/wireshark.md — networking-tool stub from the 2025-06-10 capture summary

Densify summary

  • Edits made: 75 (in 8 summaries, 4 entities, 3 concepts, 2 projects)
  • Broken wikilinks remaining: 36
  • Orphans: 5
  • Missing pages flagged: 11 (7 wikilinked summary slugs without files, 4 bare proper-noun candidates)
